articles.title: The Fallacies of Charlie Kirk: When Debate Becomes Propaganda
articles.excerpt: A short logic-based critique of Charlie Kirk’s debate style, showing how false dilemmas, straw men, crowd appeal, cherry-picking, and white Christian framing turn debate into propaganda.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Christian Nationalism Is Not Biblical Righteousness
articles.excerpt: A biblical indictment of Christian nationalism, showing how America, patriotism, and Gentile empire are often confused with covenant righteousness.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Three Laws of Logic
articles.excerpt: Identity, non-contradiction, and excluded middle as the Bible’s ordinary grammar for truthful speech.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Is Truth Reliable?
articles.excerpt: Exploring why truth is reliable — grounded in God’s character, enduring across time, and vital for Israel’s covenant identity.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Is Creation Logical?
articles.excerpt: The Bible does not ask you to suspend reason; it invites you to see reality as it is: ordered by God’s wisdom. From the opening cadence of Genesis—God speaks, it is so, it is good—creation is not chaos—it is structure, sequence, and sufficiency.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Gentiles
articles.excerpt: What does “Gentile” mean in Scripture? Tracing genos, ethnos, and goy/goyim across contexts without anachronism.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: The War In The "Middle East" Is A War For Apartheidism and White Supremacy, Not Biblical Righteousness
articles.excerpt: A covenant-centered Israelite critique of modern Zionism, colonial war, apartheidism, white supremacy, and the false claim that political nationalism equals biblical righteousness.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: 250 Years of Christianity. 250 Years Against God.
articles.excerpt: A covenant-centered response to America's 250-year Christian story, arguing that Scripture measures nations by justice, righteousness, and obedience — not religious branding.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Adam Was Not Pale: How Ruddy, Melanin, and the Color of the First Man Became White
articles.excerpt: A contextual, logical, and biological argument that Adam was not pale, but a deeply melanated dark brown-red first man capable of explaining the full range of mankind.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Rage
articles.excerpt: White supremacy is rage against creation, a worldview rooted in bigotry, hatred, false witness, and rebellion against the image of God in humanity.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Christianity’s False Dichotomy
articles.excerpt: A scriptural indictment of selective Christian ethics: why many Christians demand public justice for marriage, sexuality, religious liberty, and whiteness, but reject social justice when Black people are oppressed.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Who Gets Innocence? Karmelo Anthony, Austin Metcalf, and America’s Racial Judgment
articles.excerpt: The Karmelo Anthony and Austin Metcalf case reveals more than a tragic confrontation. It exposes how America distributes suspicion, innocence, sympathy, and moral complexity along racial lines. Scripture condemns false witness, partial judgment, and judging by appearance.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Scripture & Logic: Friends, Not Foes
articles.excerpt: Exploring how Scripture and logic complement one another—prophets, Jesus, and apostles reasoning coherently in covenant truth.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

articles.title: Israelites and Hamites: Recovering a Dark-Skinned Legacy
articles.excerpt: A structured look at historical claims and scriptural references concerning Hamites and Israel.
articles.author: Semitic Jew

podcasts.title: Semitic Jew Trailer
podcasts.description: This trailer gives an overview of what we will cover in the coming weeks here at Semitic Jew. You can expect this podcast to publish every week and provide fresh content to edify listeners to bring them to TMH in pure and awesome worship. Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

lessons.title: Did God Prophesy Israel Would Lose Their Identity?
